title: Sampling
summary: 9609 AS — sampling methods, bias, and sample size.
learningObjectives: Describe random, stratified, and quota sampling.

simpleExplanation.title: Ask a subset, infer the whole
simpleExplanation.summary: Firms rarely survey every customer. A well-designed sample saves cost while reflecting the target population.
steps: Quota: fill categories to match profile.

sections.content: **Sampling** (3.2.3) is tested with **method + limitation** for the case market. Name **bias types** explicitly.
